message:
feat(macros): implement Validate derive macro (bd-wv9)

Add #[derive(Validate)] proc macro that generates compile-time validation:
- Numeric constraints: min, max
- String constraints: min_length, max_length, pattern
- Format validators: email, url
- Required field check for Option<T>
- Custom validator function support

Also adds to sqlmodel-core:
- ValidationError type with field-level error tracking
- FieldValidationError and ValidationErrorKind enums
- Helper methods for common validation error messages

Example usage:
```rust
#[derive(Validate)]
struct User {
    #[validate(min_length = 1, max_length = 100)]
    name: String,
    #[validate(min = 0, max = 150)]
    age: i32,
}
```

Closes bd-wv9

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
